testcase.name: Processing Pill Visibility Fix - Comment Reply › should show processing pill IMMEDIATELY when replying to a comment

failure.message: pill-visibility-fix-e2e.spec.ts:22:3 should show processing pill IMMEDIATELY when replying to a comment

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › pill-visibility-fix-e2e.spec.ts:22:3 › Processing Pill Visibility Fix - Comment Reply › should show processing pill IMMEDIATELY when replying to a comment
Error: ❌ Comment button not found
52 | 53 | if (!commentButton) { > 54 | throw new Error('❌ Comment button not found'); | ^ 55 | } 56 | 57 | await commentButton.click(); at /workspaces/agent-feed/tests/e2e/pill-visibility-fix-e2e.spec.ts:54:13

testcase.system-out:
🧪 Starting pill visibility fix test... 📍 Step 1: Navigating to http://localhost:5173 ⏳ Step 2: Waiting for feed to load... 📸 Screenshot saved: 1-initial-feed-loaded-2025-11-25T07-19-09-623Z.png ✅ Feed loaded successfully 🔍 Step 3: Finding first post... ✅ Found target post 💬 Step 4: Creating a top-level comment to reply to...
